content:
Let’s begin your Form 1 Occurrence Report. Please provide:

- Date (YYYY-MM-DD or MM/DD/YYYY):
- Time (HH:MM, 24-hour):
- Classification (e.g., Incident, Near Miss, Safety, Security, Maintenance):
- Occurrence Type:
- Brief Description:
- Requested By (name):
- Report Creator (name):

Optional (if available): Call Number, Occurrence Reference.
date 2026-03-03 time 14:20 classification vehicle occurrence type collision brief description test requested by Jake report creator Jake
I captured Form 1: date 2026-03-03, time 14:20, classification vehicle, type collision, requested by Jake, creator Jake. Say confirm to submit or cancel to edit.
